entries.symptom: Pattern memory not growing
entries.root_cause: See report
entries.minimal_fix: Fixed feature data conversion in pattern pipeline

entries.symptom: Pattern memory was not growing despite hours of trading. The bot only showed the BASE_PATTERN despite processing hundreds of trades.
entries.root_cause:
The pattern recording pipeline lost features data when converting from pattern objects to the recordPatternResult API:

1. **analyzePatterns()** creates patterns with `features` field (numeric array)
2. **recordPatternResult()** was called with `signature` field (truncated string)
3. **recordPattern()** expects features array, not signature string
4. Validation failed on signature string, patterns never stored
entries.minimal_fix: Fixed feature data conversion in pattern pipeline

entries.symptom: - Three different sources of "truth" tracking the same data:
entries.root_cause:
- Three different sources of "truth" tracking the same data:
  - `this.currentPosition` in main bot (run-empire-v2.js)
  - `this.tradingBrain.position` in OptimizedTradingBrain
  - `this.executionLayer.positions` Map in AdvancedExecutionLayer
- Each module updating its own copy → phantom trades, balance mismatches
- "3 truths = 0 truth" - complete state chaos
entries.minimal_fix: - **File**: `run-empire-v2.js` (multiple locations)
what_worked: StateManager is now the ONLY source of truth
No more phantom trades or balance mismatches
All modules read/write to same centralized state

entries.symptom: - TRAI (AI decision system) blocked main loop for 2-5 seconds per decision
entries.root_cause:
- TRAI (AI decision system) blocked main loop for 2-5 seconds per decision
- During volatile moves, bot was blind while waiting for AI to "think"
- Flash crashes could happen while bot waited for philosophical analysis
entries.minimal_fix: - **File**: `run-empire-v2.js` lines 931-954
what_worked: Bot never waits for TRAI decisions
Can react instantly to market moves

entries.symptom: - StateManager used Maps for activeTrades
entries.root_cause:
- StateManager used Maps for activeTrades
- JavaScript Maps can't be serialized to JSON
- On restart, all active trades were lost
- Bot had amnesia after every restart
entries.minimal_fix: - **File**: `core/StateManager.js` lines 326-385
what_worked: Bot remembers exact position after crash
No more lost trades on reboot
Automatic save after every state update

entries.symptom: - kraken_adapter_simple.js works but doesn't implement IBrokerAdapter interface
entries.root_cause:
- kraken_adapter_simple.js works but doesn't implement IBrokerAdapter interface
- System expects v2 architecture with 30+ standard methods
- "Running a Ferrari off a matchbox car engine"
entries.minimal_fix: - **File**: `core/KrakenAdapterV2.js` (NEW FILE - 322 lines)
what_worked: Account polling (compensates for no private WebSocket)
Working solution now, native rewrite later

entries.symptom: - Rate limiter used recursion for retries
entries.root_cause:
- Rate limiter used recursion for retries
- On 429 errors, created infinite promise chain
- Stack overflow after ~1000 rate limit hits
- Memory leak from accumulated promises
entries.minimal_fix: - **File**: `kraken_adapter_simple.js` lines 109-204
what_worked: No more stack overflow on rate limits

entries.symptom: Bot buying on bearish/hold brain signals - ~50% of positions opened against brain direction
entries.root_cause: makeTradeDecision() line 1908 only checked `pos === 0 && totalConfidence >= minConfidence` without verifying brainDirection === 'buy'. Brain could say 'sell' or 'hold' and bot would still open a long position.
entries.minimal_fix: Added `&& brainDirection === 'buy'` to BUY condition at run-empire-v2.js:1908

entries.symptom: MaxProfitManager tiered profit exits completely dead - exit_partial action silently ignored
entries.root_cause: run-empire-v2.js:2082 only checked `profitResult.action === 'exit' || profitResult.action === 'exit_full'`. MaxProfitManager returns 'exit_partial' for tier hits (line 440) - this action was silently dropped.
entries.minimal_fix: Added `|| profitResult.action === 'exit_partial'` to the exit check at run-empire-v2.js:2082. Also passes exitSize in return for partial position closing.

entries.symptom: Fees never deducted from balance - P&L overstated by ~108%, backtest results unreliable
entries.root_cause: StateManager.openPosition() and closePosition() moved USD in/out without deducting Kraken trading fees (0.26% per side). All P&L calculations were fee-blind.
entries.minimal_fix: Added 0.26% fee deduction on both entry (openPosition line 316) and exit (closePosition line 400) in StateManager.js

entries.symptom: holdTime calculations used Date.now() instead of candle timestamps - all hold times ~0 in backtest, time-based exits broken
entries.root_cause: 6 locations in run-empire-v2.js used Date.now() for entryTime recording and holdTime/holdDuration calculations. In backtest mode, Date.now() is wall clock time not simulated candle time, so hold durations were microseconds instead of minutes. Time-based exits (30min stale trade, min hold time) were completely inverted.
entries.minimal_fix: Replaced Date.now() with `this.marketData?.timestamp || Date.now()` at lines 2090, 2134, 2320, 2432, 2522, 2528. Passed candle timestamp via context to StateManager.openPosition().

entries.symptom: Breakeven stop triggered guaranteed losses - fee buffer 0.1% vs actual 0.32% round-trip fees
entries.root_cause: MaxProfitManager.js:730 set feeBuffer = 0.001 (0.1%). Kraken round-trip fees are 0.52% (0.26% x 2 sides). 'Breakeven' stop was actually locking in a -0.22% loss every time it triggered.
entries.minimal_fix: Changed feeBuffer from 0.001 to 0.0035 at MaxProfitManager.js:730

entries.symptom: CandleHelper format compatibility - 59990 backtest errors
entries.root_cause: 7 files still use raw .c/.h/.l without CandleHelper import, plus variable shadowing (.map(c => conflicts with imported c function)
entries.minimal_fix: Created CandleHelper.js wrapper and migrated 13 files

entries.symptom: Pattern memory stuck at 8182 patterns all with wins:0, losses:0, totalPnL:0. Confidence perpetually at 0.1%. Learning hadn't updated since Dec 31 (7+ weeks stale).
entries.root_cause: Three broken links in pattern learning pipeline: (1) FeatureExtractor.extract() returned [] when candles < 30, causing recordPatternResult() to skip recording. (2) Entry recording was disabled on 2026-02-01, preventing new patterns from being created. (3) recordPattern() didn't distinguish observations (entry) from outcomes (exit) - all treated same, polluting with pnl=0.
entries.minimal_fix: Fix 1: FeatureExtractor returns default features [0.5,0,0,0.02,0.01,0.5,0,0,0] instead of [] when candles empty. Fix 2: recordPattern() only updates wins/losses/totalPnL when typeof result.pnl === 'number', observations (pnl:null) only increment timesSeen. Fix 3: Re-enabled entry recording with pnl:null for observation-only mode.
what_worked: pnl:null for entry, pnl:number for exit

entries.symptom: - Rate limiter used recursion for retries
entries.root_cause:
- Rate limiter used recursion for retries
- On 429 errors, created infinite promise chain
- Stack overflow after ~1000 rate limit hits
- Memory leak from accumulated promises
entries.minimal_fix: - **File**: `kraken_adapter_simple.js` lines 109-204
what_worked: No more stack overflow on rate limits

entries.symptom: 99.997% of signals killed by 6 hardcoded gates. Pattern confidence always 0, direction always hold. Even perfect signals blocked.
entries.root_cause: Six hardcoded gates in OptimizedTradingBrain and EnhancedPatternRecognition blocked nearly all signals: (1) 0.40 directional spread gate - too high for pattern-based edge (2) Regime filter OVER regime confidence already applied - double punishment (3) RSI 80/20 safety - too wide, clipping valid signals (4) determineTradingDirection() re-analyzed everything - overriding brain decisions (5) minimumMatches=3 - patterns never reached 3 occurrences (6) confidenceThreshold=0.6 - patterns never reached 60% win rate with 0 outcomes
entries.minimal_fix: (1) Replaced 0.40 gate with 5% edge minimum (2) Removed regime filter double-punishment (3) Narrowed RSI safety from 80/20 to 88/12 (4) Simplified determineTradingDirection to passthrough (5) Changed minimumMatches to 1 (6) Changed confidenceThreshold to 0.2

entries.symptom: Patterns not saving to disk - 187 patterns loaded and updated but file stays empty {} or stale
entries.root_cause: cleanup() called saveToDisk() without await. Process exited before async save completed. Fire-and-forget pattern.
entries.minimal_fix: Made cleanup() async in PatternMemorySystem and EnhancedPatternChecker, added await to saveToDisk() call, added await to patternChecker.cleanup() in run-empire-v2.js (2 locations)

entries.symptom: Backtest 0 trades with Desktop Claude baseline - test candles not recognized
entries.root_cause: Candle conversion expected Polygon format {timestamp,open,high,low,close,volume} but test candles used shorthand {t,o,h,l,c,v}
entries.minimal_fix: Added fallback in candle conversion: o: polygonCandle.open || polygonCandle.o (and same for h,l,c,v,t)

entries.symptom: TRAI inference server not starting on fresh systems
entries.root_cause: sentence_transformers Python module missing, no dependency check in startup
entries.minimal_fix: Added Python dependency check to start-ogzprime.sh: if ! python3 -c 'import sentence_transformers'; then pip3 install sentence-transformers; fi
what_worked: Runtime dependency check in startup script

entries.symptom: Similar patterns return 0 confidence even with positive win rates - exact match returns 65%, similar (±0.01) returns 0% despite 36% win rate
entries.root_cause: evaluatePattern() does exact string matching on feature key instead of similarity/distance matching. Any drift in features = no pattern match = no learning applied.
entries.minimal_fix: PENDING - Need to implement fuzzy/bucketed matching in evaluatePattern()

entries.symptom: Need to verify all 4 entry modules fire correctly - only MADynamicSR confirmed working previously
entries.root_cause: Test data requirements differ per module: EMACrossover needs trend data, LiquiditySweep needs daily ATR + 5m hammer pattern, MADynamicSR needs MA touch/bounce
entries.minimal_fix: Created module-specific test datasets in ogz-meta/ledger/test-*.json
what_failed: Generic test data triggering wrong module
Initial LiquiditySweep test missing daily ATR

entries.root_cause:
- Rate limiter used recursion for retries
- On 429 errors, created infinite promise chain
- Stack overflow after ~1000 rate limit hits
- Memory leak from accumulated promises
entries.minimal_fix: - **File**: `kraken_adapter_simple.js` lines 109-204
what_worked: No more stack overflow on rate limits

entries.symptom: 28% edge (Bull 80%, Bear 52%) producing 90% confidence. Bearish score completely ignored in finalConfidence calculation.
entries.root_cause: Lines 3014 and 3018 in OptimizedTradingBrain.js used formula finalConfidence = base + bullishConfidence for BUY (and base + bearishConfidence for SELL). This ignored the opposing side entirely - a 28% edge looked like 90% confidence because bear score was not subtracted.
entries.minimal_fix: Changed formula to finalConfidence = base + (bullishConfidence - bearishConfidence) for BUY and base + (bearishConfidence - bullishConfidence) for SELL. Now 28% edge correctly produces ~38% confidence.

entries.symptom: Every trade exited via max hold timeout. SL/TP never hit despite being configured.
entries.root_cause: Four exitContractSignal blocks in run-empire-v2.js:2644-2687 hardcoded swing-trade SL/TP values (-1.5% to -2.0% SL, 2.0% to 4.0% TP). These overrode ExitContractManager.getDefaultContract() which had correct 1-minute scaled values (~0.3-0.5% SL, 0.5-1.0% TP). Additionally, ExitContractManager volatility threshold of 2.0 was inflating stops on normal 1m data.
entries.minimal_fix: Removed hardcoded stopLossPercent, takeProfitPercent, trailingStopPercent from all 4 exitContractSignal blocks. Kept only invalidationConditions. Raised volatility threshold from 2.0 to 5.0 and reduced multipliers from 1.2/1.3 to 1.15/1.2.
what_worked: Letting ExitContractManager defaults handle SL/TP scaling
Only passing invalidationConditions from strategy blocks

entries.symptom: MADynamicSR generating 0 trades despite module working - signals not reaching orchestrator
entries.root_cause: priceHistory trimmed to 200 candles but MADynamicSR needs 220+ for 200 EMA calculation. Signal generation failed due to insufficient data.
entries.minimal_fix: Increased priceHistory limit from 200 to 250 in run-empire-v2.js:1317

entries.symptom: Backtest results unreliable - no proper fee tracking, no running balance, no CSV export, no strategy breakdown
entries.root_cause: TradeLogger skips disk writes in BACKTEST_MODE. No in-memory tracking of trades with proper fee calculations.
entries.minimal_fix: Created BacktestRecorder class: tracks all trades in memory with $25k starting balance, 0.52% round-trip fees, exports CSV at end, prints comprehensive summary with strategy breakdown and max drawdown

entries.symptom: Missing Break & Retest strategy from Desi Trades - high probability entries on level breaks with confirmation
entries.root_cause: Strategy not implemented - needed key level detection, break detection, battle zone reading, NTZ suppression
entries.minimal_fix: Created BreakAndRetest module: session high/low levels, tested S/R zones, decisive break detection, battle zone confirmation (3-15 candles, wicks, engulfing), NTZ suppression. Wired to orchestrator as strategy #4.

entries.symptom: Orchestrator let ALL trades above 25% through regardless of MIN_TRADE_CONFIDENCE env var setting. 70+ trades firing with 5% win rate.
entries.root_cause: StrategyOrchestrator initialized with hardcoded minStrategyConfidence: 0.25 at run-empire-v2.js:414. Ignored MIN_TRADE_CONFIDENCE env var entirely.
entries.minimal_fix: Wired orchestrator to read MIN_TRADE_CONFIDENCE: minStrategyConfidence: process.env.MIN_TRADE_CONFIDENCE ? parse(env) : 0.65. Default raised from 25% to 65%.

entries.symptom: MADynamicSR using fixed 1:2 R:R for TP instead of structural MA levels. Stops not adapting to volatility.
entries.root_cause: TP calculated as price + (risk * 2) regardless of market structure. SL used swing lows capped at 1.5% instead of triggering MA level.
entries.minimal_fix: TP now targets 20 SMA (next MA level above entry). SL now below 50 EMA + 1.0 ATR buffer. Added _sma() and _atr() calculation functions. Fallback to 1:2 R:R only when MA hierarchy doesn't provide target.

entries.symptom: 101/168 trades (60%) hit max_hold timeout. 0 profit_tier exits despite 12 trades reaching 0.5%+ profit. Tiered profit system completely non-functional.
entries.root_cause: 4 stacked bugs: (1) Tier targets 2/4/6/10% unreachable in 105min, (2) closePosition ignores exitSize, (3) action name mismatch exit_partial vs partialExit, (4) TradingBrain.executePartialExit doesn't sync to StateManager
entries.minimal_fix: PENDING APPROVAL: Change tier targets to 0.5/1/1.5/2.5%, wire exitSize to closePosition, standardize action names, sync partials to StateManager
what_failed: Tier targets built for swing trading (2-10%)

entries.symptom: 3 safety gate functions (checkRiskLimits, canOpenNewPosition, assessTradeRisk) existed but were never called - orphan code
entries.root_cause: Phase 7B connection map found 177 orphan functions. These 3 safety gates were wired but not plumbed into the BUY decision path.
entries.minimal_fix: Wired all 3 gates before BUY in run-empire-v2.js:2744-2770. Gate 1: checkRiskLimits (daily/weekly/monthly loss). Gate 2: canOpenNewPosition (max concurrent per tier). Gate 3: assessTradeRisk (comprehensive risk check).
what_worked: Sequential gate order: general to specific

entries.symptom: ExitContractManager.getDefaultContract() crashed when strategyName was undefined/null/number - 4 crashes in Phase 12 fuzzing
entries.root_cause: No type validation before calling .toLowerCase() on strategyName parameter
entries.minimal_fix: Added type check: if (typeof strategyName !== 'string' || !strategyName) strategyName = 'default'

entries.symptom: RiskManager.calculatePositionSize() crashed on NaN/undefined/object inputs - 8 crashes in Phase 12 fuzzing
entries.root_cause: No type validation before math operations on accountBalance and currentPrice
entries.minimal_fix: Added type validation: typeof check + isNaN + isFinite. Returns 0 safely on invalid input.

entries.symptom: MaxProfitManager.start() and update() produced NaN outputs on invalid inputs - 4 NaN outputs in Phase 12 fuzzing
entries.root_cause: No type validation on entryPrice, direction, size, currentPrice parameters
entries.minimal_fix: start(): Type check entryPrice (positive number), direction (string), size (positive number with default). update(): Type check currentPrice (number, not NaN, finite).
what_worked: Error return objects instead of crash

entries.symptom: Phase 10 state machine found missing EXITING → COOLDOWN transition. Bot could re-enter immediately after exit.
entries.root_cause: No cooldown period enforced between closing a position and opening a new one. Caused chasing and re-entering same bad setups.
entries.minimal_fix: Added candle-based cooldown (4 candles = 1hr on 15m). Uses priceHistory.length NOT Date.now() to work in backtest. Property: lastExitCandleIndex. Config: exitCooldownCandles.

entries.symptom: Default exit thresholds (SL=1.5%, TP=2.0%, Tiers 0.5%/0.8%/1.2%) causing bleeds in ranging markets
entries.root_cause: Stop loss too tight (1.5%) getting clipped before price could breathe. Profit tiers too aggressive, cutting winners short.
entries.minimal_fix: Config D validated: STOP_LOSS_PERCENT=2.0, TAKE_PROFIT_PERCENT=2.5, TIER1_TARGET=0.007, TIER2_TARGET=0.010, TIER3_TARGET=0.015
what_failed: Config F (tighter tiers 0.4%/0.6%/0.8%) - cut winners short

entries.symptom: Low confidence trades bleeding fees. Signal generator had implicit 40% floor, testing 25-60% thresholds.
entries.root_cause: MIN_TRADE_CONFIDENCE=25% let garbage signals through. 60% starved trades in uptrends.
entries.minimal_fix: MIN_TRADE_CONFIDENCE=0.50 (50%) - filters garbage without starving good signals
what_worked: 50% threshold killed seg_5 bleed while keeping uptrend trades
what_failed: 30% and 40% identical to 25% due to signal generator floor at 40%

entries.symptom: Need to confirm tuned config doesn't overfit to training data
entries.root_cause: Config tuned on 2024 segments could be overfit. Needed out-of-sample validation.
entries.minimal_fix: Validated on 2023 data (unseen) and full 45K dataset

entries.symptom: Production bot backtest shows confidence=0 on ALL signals, brainDirection=hold, zero trades executing
entries.root_cause: StrategyOrchestrator has 9 strategies but most need specific conditions (EMA crossovers, S/R bounces, liquidity sweeps). In trending data where price stays above MAs, no strategy fires. minStrategyConfidence=0.35 filters everything.
entries.minimal_fix: PENDING - Options: 1) Add simpler momentum strategy 2) Lower threshold for backtest 3) Use tuning-backtest.js results instead
what_worked: tuning-backtest.js works because it uses simpler RSI-based logic
what_failed: Production orchestrator too selective for backtest data

entries.symptom: Pattern bank shows 8181 patterns when we deleted them. Two different pattern files exist.
entries.root_cause: Two pattern storage locations: 1) trai_brain/learned_patterns.paper.json (4 patterns, clean) 2) data/pattern-memory.paper.json (8181 patterns, bloated). Bot loads from data/ not trai_brain/.
entries.minimal_fix: Delete data/pattern-memory.paper.json and backup files

entries.symptom: Bot crash loop after restart - Cannot find module kraken_adapter_simple, TierFeatureFlags, OgzTpoIntegration
entries.root_cause: Files incorrectly archived as dead code. Static analysis missed dynamic dependencies via ModuleAutoLoader.get() and IBroker wrapper chain. Bot ran on stale memory for 16h.
entries.minimal_fix: Restored files from archive: kraken_adapter_simple.js (root), TierFeatureFlags.js (root), OgzTpoIntegration.js (core/)

entries.symptom: PAPER_TRADING=true in .env but bot sent real orders to Kraken, resulting in $50 loss
entries.root_cause: OrderExecutor.js only checked BACKTEST_MODE, ignored PAPER_TRADING flag entirely. Orders went to real exchange despite paper mode being enabled.
entries.minimal_fix: Added PAPER_TRADING constant and check in OrderExecutor.js line 24-25 and 105-106
what_worked: Adding explicit PAPER_TRADING check alongside BACKTEST_MODE
what_failed: Trusting that flag existed without verifying code enforced it

entries.symptom: MAX_DRAWDOWN and MAX_DAILY_LOSS flags loaded but never enforced. Trading continued even when limits exceeded.
entries.root_cause: RiskManager had isTradingAllowed() and assessTradeRisk() methods but TradingLoop never called them. Methods existed but were dead code.
entries.minimal_fix: Added riskManager.isTradingAllowed() and assessTradeRisk() checks before BUY decisions in TradingLoop.js lines 421-462
what_worked: Wiring existing enforcement code to decision path

entries.symptom: Position size could exceed MAX_POSITION_SIZE when confidence multiplier was high
entries.root_cause: Confidence multiplier (up to 2.5x) was applied after reading MAX_POSITION_SIZE but no cap was enforced afterward. 10% max * 2.5x = 25% actual.
entries.minimal_fix: Added cap in OrderExecutor.js: if (basePositionPercent > maxPositionPercent * 2.5) basePositionPercent = maxPositionPercent * 2.5

entries.symptom: Confidence always 0% after restart. RSI=null despite having 16 candles in priceHistory.
entries.root_cause: priceHistory loaded 97 candles from disk but IndicatorEngine started empty. Out of sync - priceHistory.length=16 but IndicatorEngine.candles.length=3.
entries.minimal_fix: Added indicatorEngine.computeBatch(priceHistory) in run-empire-v2.js lines 602-610 to replay saved candles through indicators on startup
what_worked: computeBatch() designed exactly for this - deterministic replay

entries.symptom: EMASMACrossover and MADynamicSR strategies never fire after restart
MADynamicSR detected 0 swings even with 200+ candles replayed
LiquiditySweep constructor was empty {}, ignoring all 12 TradingConfig params
entries.root_cause: Constructor used wrong key names vs what TradingConfig provided. Zero params were being read.
entries.minimal_fix: Wire all 12 params from TradingConfig.get('strategies.LiquiditySweep') in run-empire-v2.js lines 516-528
what_worked: Direct TradingConfig wiring matching production pattern

entries.symptom: MADynamicSR using 20 MA as S/R level (wrong interpretation of Trader DNA method)
entries.root_cause: Misinterpretation of Trader DNA method - 20 MA is for slope/trend detection, 200 MA is for S/R bounces
entries.minimal_fix: Full rewrite: 20 MA for slope trend detection only, 200 MA for S/R bounce entries. Added proper slope calculation, extension detection, first-touch skip.
what_worked: Proper separation of trend detection (20 MA) vs S/R (200 MA)
what_failed: Original conflation of both into one signal

entries.symptom: MAExtensionFilter in orchestrator duplicated MADynamicSR's internal extension detection - stacked gates killing signals
entries.root_cause: 6 filters between signal and trade, MAExtensionFilter was redundant after MADynamicSR rewrite
entries.minimal_fix: Disabled MAExtensionFilter in StrategyOrchestrator.js lines 115-136
what_worked: Disabling redundant gate, letting strategy handle its own filtering

entries.symptom: VP chop filter blocking trend strategies in balanced markets - another stacked gate
entries.root_cause: VolumeProfile regime filter was one of 6 gates between signal and trade. Strategies already handle their own slope/chop detection.
entries.minimal_fix: Disabled VP chop filter in StrategyOrchestrator.js lines 391-412
what_worked: Letting strategies handle own regime detection

entries.symptom: OrderExecutor had hardcoded 0.32% fees instead of TradingConfig values. AdaptiveTimeframeSelector had 0.26% hardcoded.
entries.root_cause: Fee values scattered across codebase instead of single source of truth in TradingConfig
entries.minimal_fix: OrderExecutor: TradingConfig.get('fees.makerFee'), TradingConfig.get('fees.takerFee'). AdaptiveTimeframeSelector: same pattern. Removed dead config from TradingConfig.

entries.symptom: Backtest constructors empty {} while production used full TradingConfig. Every backtest number was fantasy.
entries.root_cause: tuning-backtest-full.js never updated when production constructors changed. EMACrossover, LiquiditySweep, VolumeProfile all empty.
entries.minimal_fix: Sync all constructors with run-empire-v2.js: EMACrossover (3 params), MADynamicSR (12 params), LiquiditySweep (10 params), VolumeProfile (5 params)
what_worked: Copy exact constructor pattern from run-empire-v2.js

entries.symptom: FEES_PCT defaulted to 0.25% (one side) not 0.50% (round-trip). All P&L was optimistic.
entries.root_cause: Default value only accounted for maker fee, not round-trip (maker + taker)
entries.minimal_fix: Changed FEES_PCT default from 0.25 to 0.50 in tuning-backtest-full.js line 45

entries.symptom: 5 files still had hardcoded fee values (0.0026, 0.0035, 0.0052) scattered through codebase
entries.root_cause: Historical fixes applied piecemeal - never centralized to TradingConfig. BacktestRecorder, PnLCalculator, MaxProfitManager, StateManager all had hardcoded values.
entries.minimal_fix: Replace all hardcoded fees with TradingConfig.get() calls. Added TradingConfig imports where needed.
what_worked: Adding TradingConfig imports to files that lacked them

entries.symptom: LiquiditySweep feedCandle() expected 1m candles but received 15m from production. Opening candle collected 225min instead of 15min. Entry window 15x too long.
entries.root_cause: Internal 1m→15m aggregation assumed 1m input, but production websocket sends 15m candles directly. Aggregation multiplied timing by 15x.
entries.minimal_fix: Removed aggregation buffers (_minuteBuffer5m, _minuteBuffer15m). Process 15m candles directly. Session open detection checks if 15m candle contains open minute.
what_worked: Pipeline STRUCTURAL fix with replacement blocks
what_failed: Internal aggregation assumed wrong input timeframe

entries.symptom: LiquiditySweep blocked all signals during ATR warmup - 0 trades for first ~15 days
entries.root_cause: Line 215 required dailyATR to be non-null. Lines 221-222 produced NaN threshold when dailyATR was null, causing isManipCandle=false.
entries.minimal_fix: L215: Remove dailyATR check. L221: Ternary for null. L222: Default true when threshold null.

entries.symptom: TradingConfig sent entryWindowBars but detector reads entryWindowMinutes - config value silently ignored
entries.root_cause: Timeframe-agnostic rewrite changed config key from bars to minutes but TradingConfig not updated
entries.minimal_fix: Changed 4 files: TradingConfig, run-empire-v2, tuning-backtest-full, smoke-test to use entryWindowMinutes:90

entries.symptom: RiskManager reading process.env.RISK_MANAGER_BYPASS directly at runtime
entries.root_cause: Legacy pattern - process.env accessed in module instead of injected via constructor
entries.minimal_fix: Add riskManagerBypass to constructor config, pass from resolvedConfig in run-empire-v2.js

entries.symptom: Two separate pattern stores causing data fragmentation - PatternMemorySystem in EnhancedPatternRecognition and PatternMemoryStore for TRAI
entries.root_cause: Historical organic growth created two separate pattern stores with different APIs and storage formats. TRAI couldn't read patterns learned by the pipeline.
entries.minimal_fix: Created UnifiedPatternMemory singleton with DTW matching. Wired to EnhancedPatternRecognition, TRAIDecisionModule, trai_core, OrderExecutor. Deleted old stores.
what_worked: Singleton pattern for single source of truth
DTW fuzzy matching finds similar patterns
Compatibility layer for old API calls

entries.symptom: TRAI model unloaded from VRAM between 15-minute trade cycles, causing slow first inference each cycle
entries.root_cause: Ollama default keep_alive is 5 minutes, but trade interval is 15 minutes. Model unloaded during idle time.
entries.minimal_fix: Added keep_alive: '20m' to Ollama generate requests in persistent_llm_client.js

entries.symptom: RSI null DTO validation errors spamming logs during indicator warmup
entries.root_cause: IndicatorSnapshotDTO required RSI to be a number, but RSI is null during first 14 candles of warmup
entries.minimal_fix: Made RSI nullable in schema: z.number().min(0).max(100).nullable()

entries.symptom: TRAI warmup returned empty response, causing fallback warning
entries.root_cause: Warmup used 10 max tokens but reasoning models need room for <think> blocks before producing output
entries.minimal_fix: Increased warmup tokens from 10 to 100 in persistent_llm_client.js
what_worked: Giving reasoning model room to think

entries.symptom: TRAI system prompt was crypto-only, couldn't advise on stocks
entries.root_cause: Modelfile.trai had 'cryptocurrency trading AI' in system prompt
entries.minimal_fix: Expanded system prompt to cover stocks, ETFs, and crypto with technical analysis capabilities
what_worked: Broader system prompt covering all tradeable assets

entries.symptom: CandlePatternDetector.js existed with 12+ pattern types but was NEVER IMPORTED - orphan code generating no signals
entries.root_cause: CandlePatternDetector was built but never wired into TradingLoop. Only EnhancedPatternRecognition.analyzePatterns() was called, which only queries pattern memory (not detect real patterns).
entries.minimal_fix: Import CandlePatternDetector, call detect() alongside analyzePatterns(), merge results

entries.symptom: TradingConfig had per-timeframe SL/TP/trail settings but ExitContractManager never read them - all trades used 15m defaults
entries.root_cause: createExitContract() only read DEFAULT_CONTRACTS per strategy, ignoring timeframeConfig with proper 1m/5m/15m/1h/4h parameters.
entries.minimal_fix: Add timeframe parameter to createExitContract(), call TradingConfig.getTimeframeConfig(timeframe)

entries.symptom: minTradeConfidence=0.01 (1%) let everything pass - rubber stamp gate causing massive churn (15,633 trades)
entries.root_cause: Default 0.01 was set to 'allow env var overrides' but in practice meant no filtering at all.
entries.minimal_fix: Raised minTradeConfidence from 0.01 to 0.35 (35%)

entries.symptom: IndicatorEngine returns superTrendDirection but downstream expects indicators.trend - always undefined, RegimeDetector gets bad data
entries.root_cause: Data structure mismatch between IndicatorEngine DTO output and TradingLoop expectations.
entries.minimal_fix: Add backward compat mapping: indicators.trend = indicators.superTrendDirection || 'sideways'

entries.symptom: Multi-position fix allowed stacking 50 longs on same candle - 15,633 trades in 2yr backtest instead of ~300
entries.root_cause: TradingLoop checked activeTrades.length < maxPositions but not if same-direction position already existed.
entries.minimal_fix: Add hasLongPosition/hasShortPosition checks with sameDirectionBlock gate before entry

entries.symptom: Confidence comparison inconsistent across threshold checks
entries.root_cause: minTradeConfidence * 100 mixed with orchResult.confidence on different scales
entries.minimal_fix: Remove * 100, compare (orchResult.confidence / 100) >= minConfidence

entries.symptom: 540 lines dead code in trai_brain/PatternMemoryBank.js
entries.root_cause: PatternMemoryBank never imported - replaced by UnifiedPatternMemory
entries.minimal_fix: git rm trai_brain/PatternMemoryBank.js

entries.symptom: Pattern observation spam on every candle with pnl: null
entries.root_cause: recordPatternResult called in patterns.forEach loop on every processCandle
entries.minimal_fix: Remove observation recording - patterns only recorded at trade CLOSE with real P&L

entries.symptom: Position scalar desync from activeTrades in multi-position scenarios
entries.root_cause: closePosition updated position but not checking if activeTrades was empty
entries.minimal_fix: Add check: if activeTrades.size === 0 then position = 0

entries.symptom: No way to export patterns to categorized packs
entries.root_cause: Missing tool for TRAI Pattern Library Architecture
entries.minimal_fix: Created tools/generate-pattern-pack.js with 5 categories
